disband.confirm_description:
Are you sure you want to dissolve **{name}** (`{tag}`)?

This action is **IRREVERSIBLE** and will delete:
• All team members
• Pending invitations
• Team wars and matches
• All team references

**This action cannot be undone.**
disband.confirm_footer: Confirm twice to dissolve the team
disband.final_description:
**ARE YOU COMPLETELY SURE?**

You are about to permanently dissolve **{name}** (`{tag}`).

This action **CANNOT BE UNDONE**.

Press 'Confirm Dissolution' to proceed.
disband.final_footer: This is your last chance to cancel
disband.completed_description:
The team **{name}** (`{tag}`) has been completely dissolved.

Deleted:
• All members
• Pending invitations
• Team wars
• Match references
disband.cancelled: ✅ Dissolution cancelled. The team remains active.

errors.only_leader: ❌ Only the leader can dissolve the team.

ranks.title: 🏆 Ranking System - Inazuma Eleven VR
ranks.description: Available ranks and ELO needed to reach them
ranks.footer: Use /profile to see your current rank

help.title: 📚 Available Commands - Inazuma Eleven VR Bot
help.description: Complete list of commands organized by categories

profile_stats.name: 👤 Profile and Statistics
profile_stats.value:
`/profile [user]` - Shows your profile or another player's profile
`/leaderboard [category] [type]` - Shows the ranking:
  • Players: ELO, XP, Wins, Win Rate
  • Teams: ELO
`/ranks` - Shows all leagues and the ELO needed to reach them

matches.name: ⚔️ Matches
matches.value:
`/matchmaking` - Search for an anonymous 1v1 match
`/cancel-matchmaking` - Cancel all your active searches
`/score [opponent] [score1] [score2]` - Report the result of a match

teams.name: 👥 Teams
teams.value:
`/team-create [name] [tag] [logo]` - Creates a professional team
`/team [action]` - Team management:
  • `info` - View team information
  • `members` - View team members
  • `invite [member]` - Invite a player
  • `leave` - Leave the team
  • `kick [member]` - Kick a member
  • `set-role [member] [role]` - Change a member's role
  • `disband` - Dissolve the team (leader only)

wars.name: ⚔️ Team Wars (Interclan)
wars.value:
`/war [action]` - Team War commands:
  • `challenge [team] [type]` - Challenge another team (leader only)
    - Type: Friendly (50% ELO) or Competition (150% ELO)
  • `select-players` - Select lineup of 5 players (leader only)
  • `status` - View current war status
  • `report-results` - Report results of the 5 matches

tournaments.name: 🏆 Tournaments
tournaments.value:
`/tournament [action]` - Challonge tournament management:
  • `create [name] [url] [type]` - Create a new tournament
  • `list` - List all created tournaments
  • `join [id]` - Register for a tournament
  • `participants [id]` - View tournament participants
  • `matches [id]` - View tournament matches
  • `start [id]` - Start a tournament
  • `status [id]` - View detailed tournament status
  • `bracket [id]` - View tournament bracket link
  • `delete [id]` - Delete a tournament (administrators only)

admin.name: ⚙️ Administration
admin.value:
`/sync` - Syncs bot commands (administrators only)
`/server-id` - Shows the current server ID (administrators only)
`/language [language]` - Changes the bot's language (Español, English, Français)

info.name: 💡 Information
info.value:
• Commands with `[parameter]` are optional
• Commands with `(leader only)` require being team leader
• Commands with `(administrators only)` require administrator permissions
• Use `/help` to see this list again

help.footer: Inazuma Eleven VR Bot - Competitive system

language.title: 🌐 Language Changed
language.description: Your language has been changed to **{language}**
language.footer: All bot messages will now appear in {language}

errors.invalid: ❌ Invalid language. Available languages: Español, English, Français

sync.no_permission: ❌ Only administrators can use this command.
sync.global_synced:
✅ Synced {count} commands globally.
⚠️ It may take up to 1 hour to appear on all servers.
sync.guild_synced:
✅ Synced {count} commands for this server.
Commands should appear immediately.

server_id.message:
🆔 Server ID: `{id}`

To sync commands faster, add this to your `.env` file:
```
DISCORD_GUILD_ID={id}
```
Then restart the bot.
